behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all key APIs tested: Bus.subscribe/subscribeAll, WorkspaceContext.provide, Instance.provide, Bus.InstanceDisposed, GlobalBus.on, AbortController/signal, createOpencodeClient removal, RPC exports (fetch, snapshot, server, checkUpgrade, reload, shutdown), and style constraints (no any, no else, no try/catch, const over let).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what APIs to use and what behavior is required but does not provide the exact code structure (e.g., the Promise/settle pattern, reconnection loop) from the gold patch.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for presence of API calls (Bus.subscribe*, WorkspaceContext.provide, Instance.provide) and absence of old APIs, not specific variable names or line positions; alternative correct implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use TypeScript compiler API to walk the AST, not string matching — they inspect real call expressions, new expressions, and property accesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub would fail bus_subscribe, workspace_provide, instance_provide checks and the not_stub >= 15 meaningful AST nodes check; removal of createOpencodeClient is also required.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All required elements (Bus, WorkspaceContext, Instance, InstanceDisposed, GlobalBus, AbortController, RPC exports, style constraints) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have clear names, section comment headers (Gate, Fail-to-pass), and docstrings explaining each check.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies code, not structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: File path is named but that's the only file to modify; no specific line numbers or exact replacement code given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
